top_events.title: Spectrum | Onward and Upward
top_events.description: Second test flight of the Isar Spectrum launch vehicle carrying 5 cubesats and 1 non-separable experiment for ESA's 'Boost!' program.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the launch.

top_events.title: Kinetica 1 | Unknown Payload
top_events.description: Launch of Kinetica 1 with an undisclosed payload from Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center.
top_events.action: Follow updates for potential payload details.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-21
top_events.description: Deployment of 25 Starlink satellites for global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Tune in to SpaceX's live webcast.
